---
title: Citing serocalculator
---

To cite `serocalculator` in publications, please use:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
print(citation("serocalculator"), style = "textVersion")
```

A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| comment: ""
print(citation("serocalculator"), style = "bibtex")
```
